tip_en: Follow the 20-20-20 rule: every 20 minutes, look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.
Encourage regular breaks from screens during homework.
Keep screens at arm's length to reduce eye strain.
Prioritize good lighting and posture over blue light filters.
Use night mode to reduce glare in the evening.
Set device brightness to comfortable levels to minimize eye fatigue.
Aim for at least 60 minutes of outdoor daylight play most days.
Combine outdoor time with active play for overall health.
Plan outdoor reading breaks between homework tasks.
Maintain a consistent bedtime to support eye comfort.
Avoid screens at least 30 minutes before bed.
Schedule routine vision screenings as recommended by your healthcare provider.
Offer a variety of colorful fruits and vegetables for overall eye health.
